channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US judge extends block on Trump’s $1.8bn ‘anti-weaponisation’ fund
item.description: Justice Department had walked back controversial plan after meeting backlash from lawmakers and lawsuits.

item.title: Pakistan says ‘final, agreed upon’ text of Iran war ceasefire deal reached
item.description: This is a breaking news story.

item.title: Pro-Russian opposition party calls for Armenian election result annulment
item.description: Strong Armenia claims that incumbent Civil Contract party won Sunday's election due to voting irregularities.

item.title: USA vs Paraguay: World Cup fever grips Los Angeles despite Trump policies
item.description: Fans in FIFA World Cup host city Los Angeles criticise the organisers and travel policies but are eager for the action.

item.title: SpaceX IPO debuts in US markets, Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire
item.description: The landmark listing cemented Musk's status as the first trillionaire and propelled SpaceX into ranks of most valuable.

item.title: Alarm as Ebola spreads into new areas of DR Congo
item.description: Cases are being identified in new health zones on a near-daily basis, warns WHO's head of epidemiology.

item.title: Activists form human Palestine flag at World Cup opener in Mexico City
item.description: Pro-Palestinian demonstrators gathered in Mexico City to form a giant human Palestinian flag.

item.title: Archaeologists find ancient female-led society in Turkiye
item.description: Archaeologists have discovered evidence of an ancient female-led society in the ruins of a city in present-day Turkiye.

item.title: Why Mo Amer jokes to survive
item.description: He’s become one of the most prominent Palestinian voices in comedy, but can Mo Amer laugh through this moment?

item.title: ‘Dishonorable’: Trump says leaked Iran ceasefire terms fake
item.description: Trump decries 'dishonorable people' after reports Iran made few concessions in deal US has said could be soon signed.

item.title: Ukraine reclaims territory as it doubles attacks on Russian logistics
item.description: Ukraine says its 'lockdown' strategy is working as it disrupts Russian supply lines.

item.title: Indonesian students protest gov’t policies amid economic strain
item.description: Scuffles broke out as some demonstrators attempted to break through the police lines and metal barricades.

item.title: Video: AI models predict World Cup results
item.description: We asked four AI models to predict the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Backlash after US actor Jerry Seinfeld says Palestine ‘doesn’t exist’
item.description: US actor Jerry Seinfeld is facing backlash after saying Palestine ‘doesn’t exist’.

item.title: Are Iran, US really close to a breakthrough ‘deal’?
item.description: Trump says a deal with Iran could be signed in Europe over the weekend. Tehran cautions against speculation.

item.title: London mayor slams event touting illegal Israeli settlement land sales
item.description: 'Great Israeli Real Estate Event' promotes the sale of stolen Palestinian land in settlements in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Renowned British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
item.description: Hockney is considered an influential and defining figure in 20th and 21st century contemporary painting.

item.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after years in coma
item.description: Thailand is mourning Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest child and potential heir, who died at 47.

item.title: Violence escalates in Israel amid ultra-Orthodox military draft protests
item.description: The struggle over military service is stoking protests, threatening Israel's coalition and reshaping political debate.

item.title: One injured as Israel hits southern Lebanon with air raids, artillery
item.description: The attacks come as Iranian media reports that a draft peace deal with the US would include ending the war in Lebanon.

item.title: A year after Air India crash killed 260: Do we know what happened?
item.description: Families of victims still await a final report about the Boeing 787 Dreamliner that crashed in Ahmedabad last year.

item.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
item.description: Despite the collapse of European fighter jet venture, there is optimism about the future of Europe's strategic autonomy.

item.title: Nigeria killed more than 13,000 ‘terrorists’ in past year, president says
item.description: President Tinubu takes victorious tone despite recent mass kidnappings by armed groups across the country.

item.title: Riots, violence, hate: Anti-immigrant unrest spells danger in Belfast
item.description: Crowds exploiting a knife attack are inflicting terror on Northern Ireland's ethnic minority communities.

item.title: New Zealand great Kane Williamson retires from international cricket
item.description: New Zealand's most prolific run-scorer and arguably greatest-ever batsman announces immediate retirement.
